The UG Programme is accredited by NBA during 2008-09, 2014-17, 2017-20 and the accreditation was extended upto 2028. The Department has PG Programme in AI&DS with 18 Students in the year 2022-23. Strength of the Department is 30 active faculty, out of them 14 Doctorates from IITs, NITs and Reputed Universities. Faculty are specialized in diversified research areas like AI, ML, IoT, Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, Image Processing, Remote sensing and Software Reliability. Department has Collaborative laboratories in association with Apple, IBM and Anblicks. Startups are established in the Department and have 20+ MoUs with Industry Partners, 50+ Companies offering Internships. The Department is recognized as Research Center by JNTU, Kakinada since 2018.Department bagged 500+ research publications, 35+ patents, and research projects from national bodies ISRO, UGC, and AICTE with total research grant of Rs.59,87,520/- and consultancy amount of Rs.30,82,029/-. Department is blessed with dynamic students through consistent academic results and 100% placement record for the last 05 academic years. Department is running 03 professional student chapters – CSI, ACM, ACMW and 05 Student Clubs – Google Developer Student Club(GDSC), CodeChef, AIML, ThinkD and Samskruthi. Vision To offer high quality graduate and post graduate programs in information technology and computer science education and to prepare students for professional career or higher studies. The department promotes excellence in teaching, research, collaborative activities and positive contributions to society. Mission Dr. M. Placement Offers A.Y 2024-25 Till date 0 Companies Visited 0 HIghest Package 0 LPA Average CTC 0 LPA Package Offered by Accenture for 65 Students 4.5- 0 LPA Package Offered by TCS for 47 Students 0 LPA Placement Report Faculty The Department of Information Technology is supported by a team of highly qualified, experienced, and dedicated faculty members, many of whom hold Ph.D. degrees and are recognized for their expertise in areas such as Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, and Software Engineering. The faculty actively engage in research and consultancy projects funded by government and industry, publish in reputed national and international journals, and contribute to conferences and innovation activities. They regularly participate in Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), workshops, and certifications to stay updated with emerging technologies. With strong industry collaboration and a focus on practical learning, the faculty are committed to nurturing students into competent professionals, innovators, and future leaders in the IT domain.
